item.title: RIP, President Jimmy Carter by: Mike Luckovich of the The Atlanta Journal-Constitution
item.description:
He led by example.
He never expected anything in return.
He was, and will always be remembered as, a great human being.

item.dc:creator: dbsportsdetroit

item.title: A wholesome Sunday dump with cute animals and appreciation for my fav posters on here <3
item.description:
I hope this post can be a little oasis between all the craziness :)
Just wanna mention my fav posters
Im not posting a lot of memes, but Im trying!
Love the THT community <3
My poor heart
This man knows!
Never fails to make me laugh <3
He looks like he will break your heart, but it will be worth it, damnit!
Let it all out little one <3
I blame all of you for the countless hours going down the drain :'D
Cat tax <3 Thank you for all the laughs (and sometimes wholesome cries) in 2024. I hope Imgur wont forget that its you, us, who make this site a good place to hang out. See you next year :)
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.description:
https://content.techgig.com/technology/developer-fires-entire-team-for-ai-now-ends-up-searching-for-engineers-on-linkedin/articleshow/116659064.cms
https://content.techgig.com/technology/developer-fires-entire-team-for-ai-now-ends-up-searching-for-engineers-on-linkedin/articleshow/116659064.cms see also https://www.reddit.com/r/LinkedInLunatics/comments/1hjg60d/replaced_his_dev_team_with_ai/
item.dc:creator: psuedon

item.title: Team Acorn is losing. Awaken the seven servers and the controller
item.description: The servers are the 7 Chaos. Chaos is power... Power enriched by the heart. The controller is the one that unifies the Chaos. Took way too long to balance the damn things end to end.
item.dc:creator: SarahTheCuteVixen

item.title: An unhinged year-end dump: sayonara edition
item.description:
This works as a bonus-parent, too
But why is it so easy to be so sleepy, when least opportune?
But that’s me at baseline
The best part of coming home is Wally’s reactions, unbridled zoomies
And it’s not a seasonal thing, that shit goes year round
“Just take it one thing at a time.” Okay but they come at me in 3’s, how should I prioritize?
Wally’s normal is trying to gaslight me saying I forgot to feed him
Which doggo is your spirit animal, right now?
This was cute
I’d watch it!
I can supply various vices, whatever (legally) helps.
This is the pressure DARE tried to warn us about
“I ain’t got nothing but love for ya”
I get to marry my best friend in 160 days so we can spend the rest of our lives like this
This was an interesting transition
We’ve had some doozies in our adventures, what are some of your nutty grocery-delivery stories?
Take 1-2 QD, PRN
Bring on all of the derpiest dummy thicc bois. Also, please leave their ears floppy. It adds to the derp level.
I’ve got that going for me, which is nice
My brain and my mouth can’t move at the same speed and I bite my lip or cheeks constantly
Festive depression deserves some credit, it’s not the same as seasonal, to me
Can-do’s-ville, babydoll
Bill and James have some wild conversations
You know, I’m something of a chef, myself
Seventh grade me just got stopped in her jelly-sandal tracks
I’m used to having at least two around, this past year has sucked
Found my spirit animal
An absolute unit of an animal
I used to feel like if I didn’t respond right away, it was inconsiderate to the sender. I’ve gotten better with letting this go, as I’ve gotten older.
I don’t have the energy to jump jump, anymore
Scumbag brain
Unconditioning oneself is exhausting
Shout out to the eel in the Roku screen saver
Cheesy shit I’ve sent to the fiancée
Also works for being in your early 40s
Here’s some Gemma brain bleach, as a treat for making it all the way through. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year, fellow Imgurian. Stay safe!
item.dc:creator: tellyourdogisaidhi

item.title: Day 114 of my journey for a wheelchair
item.description: 16050/36500 https://gofund.me/8b5802c4
item.dc:creator: Dorlingus

item.title: BIG DAY
item.description: Previously he would tell me what he was thinking, meme-or-silly-picture-wise, and I would make it for him. But based on some hilarious holiday photos he turned his sister into the baby from Nirvana's Nevermind, his mom into Jay Kay from Jamiroquai, Prince riding his motorcycle, and etc. and I couldn't be more proud. Give a man a fish and you'll have one less fish to worry about. Teach a man to fish and he'll poorly paste your face onto one of the Beatles as they cross Abbey Road. Marriage is hilarious.
item.dc:creator: ImmortalChild

item.title: He will never recover from this loss
